message:
🐛 Restore CONSOLE_AUTO token in ai-fix workflow (#2139)

The infra sync PR #2055 replaced `secrets.CONSOLE_AUTO || secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN`
with just `secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN`, breaking Copilot coding agent's ability to
push commits to PRs. Restore the PAT fallback.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
